clauses.statement: The closed autonomous registry contains diagnose, prepare_artifacts, implement, verify, review, repair, and final_prepare, and Guarded Run composes them only through canonical owner ports.

test_pattern.must_contain: AAD-S-1 autonomous profile exposes the closed implementation DAG
AAD-S-1 Guarded Run composes the autonomous DAG through closed action owners

clauses.statement: A dependency-incomplete, policy-denied, unknown, or forged autonomous Action is rejected before its runner executes.

test_pattern.must_contain: AAD-S-2 policy-denied autonomous actions fail closed before their runner executes
AAD-S-6 dependency-incomplete suffix cannot execute its runner

clauses.statement: Completed autonomous checkpoints are keyed by Run, node, profile, and input HEAD. Same-HEAD resume skips replay, while a HEAD-changing mutation preserves that node as the dependency boundary and immediately rebinds the remaining suffix to new-HEAD keys.

test_pattern.must_contain: AAD-S-2 autonomous checkpoints are idempotent for the same Run and HEAD
AAD-S-3 HEAD-changing implement rebinds the remaining autonomous suffix
AAD-S-3 autonomous checkpoints resume after recreating the Guarded Run session
AAD-S-3 autonomous implement HEAD change rebinds verify through final_prepare immediately

clauses.statement: Autonomous runners accept only typed results, and pr_ready is reachable only from final_prepare after the current-HEAD Gate SSOT reports ready_for_pr_create.

test_pattern.must_contain: AAD-S-4 only final_prepare may produce pr_ready
AAD-S-4 injected final_prepare cannot bypass the current-head Gate SSOT

clauses.statement: The autonomous registry excludes arbitrary shell, merge, waiver, and deploy, while explicit feature disable preserves the legacy two-node plan and records requested/effective profile plus fallback reason.

test_pattern.must_contain: AAD-S-5 disabling autonomous explicitly falls back to the legacy plan
AAD-S-5 public CLI disables autonomous execution before resuming an existing Run

clauses.statement: Every autonomous transition is either continue to the dependent node, a typed terminal wait/block/failure that stops dependents, or final_prepare-only pr_ready; prohibited combinations fail closed.

test_pattern.must_contain: AAD-S-6 waiting_for_runtime stops before dependent autonomous nodes
AAD-S-4 only final_prepare may produce pr_ready

clauses.statement: The composition port journals only canonical owner artifact references; a missing owner produces a typed waiting_for_runtime stop, and autonomous verify never falls through to the legacy pr-ready autopilot.

test_pattern.must_contain: AAD-S-7 autonomous composition preserves canonical owner artifact references
AAD-S-3 missing autonomous owner stops with typed runtime recovery
AAD-S-7 autonomous verify never falls through to the legacy pr-ready autopilot

diagrams.title: Autonomous action execution trust boundary
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  Input[Story and current HEAD] --> Plan[Closed autonomous Action DAG]
  Plan --> Owners[Injected canonical owner runners]
  Owners --> Journal[HEAD-bound checkpoint journal]
  Journal --> Final[final_prepare Gate SSOT]
  Unknown[Unknown profile action or forged plan] -. rejected .-> Stop[typed fail-closed stop]
  Missing[Missing runtime owner] -. no silent skip .-> Wait[waiting_for_runtime]
  Plan -. excludes .-> SideEffects[merge waiver deploy arbitrary shell]
